productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Washed Grey Jeans
description: Composition Blue denim jeans made of 100% cotton fabric, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket on the right side, two patch pockets at the back, elasticated waist with belt loops and metal zipper and button closure Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent Do not bleach Remove promptly after washing and avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of jeans from palm tree that plays as hard as he does. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take him out. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
